scripts.name: build
scripts.command: npm run build -w @immaculate/core && npm run build -w @immaculate/harness && npm run build -w @immaculate/tui && npm run build -w @immaculate/dashboard

scripts.name: test
scripts.command: npm run build -w @immaculate/core && npm run test --workspaces --if-present

issues.title: No cross-repo product inventory existed before this generated audit surface.
issues.evidence: Routes, endpoints, UI calls, exports, tests, and file-backed stores were discoverable only by manual search.
issues.fix: Keep `npm run audit:inventory` in the release checklist and update this report before broad product claims.

issues.title: Dashboard proxy covers governed harness DELETE routes.
issues.evidence: Dashboard proxy exports governed DELETE support for the explicit harness removal-route allowlist.
issues.fix: Keep DELETE route expansion behind explicit allowlist tests.

issues.title: Actuation websocket is implemented but not part of the dashboard ticket route allowlist.
issues.evidence: `/stream/actuation/device` exists in the harness; dashboard socket tickets support only `/stream` and `/stream/neuro/live`.
issues.fix: Add a dedicated dashboard ticket type for actuation device links or keep it intentionally external and document that boundary.

issues.title: Frontend and TUI flows have no direct automated tests.
issues.evidence: Dashboard tests: 2; TUI tests: 0. Harness tests: 175.
issues.fix: Add dashboard route-handler tests for auth/proxy behavior and TUI command tests for governed request headers.

issues.title: Q current-date awareness is now a first-class exported runtime context.
issues.evidence: A date/time context export was detected.
issues.fix: Keep the runtime context injected anywhere Q or Discord agents answer questions about current facts.

issues.title: Several backend endpoints are not called by the dashboard or TUI.
issues.evidence: 66 endpoint(s) have no operator UI caller in this scan. Some are valid CLI/worker/public-gateway surfaces; the rest need route ownership decisions.
issues.fix: Mark each no-UI endpoint as public gateway, CLI-only, worker-only, or product gap, then add tests or remove it.

plan.action: Add a shared runtime context block with current date, knowledge cutoff, project roles, and governed tool policy; inject it into Q gateway, Immaculate Q API, and Discord-agent prompts.

plan.target: Dashboard proxy and websocket route coverage
plan.action: Add tests first, then extend the proxy/ticket allowlists only for governed operator flows that need same-origin browser access.
Classify all no-UI endpoints as UI, CLI, worker, public gateway, or retired. Remove or document dead code.
Keep iorch.net, qline.site, and aura-genesis.org copy short, customer-facing, and evidence-backed without internal footnote language.
Restamp Terminal-Bench, BridgeBench, W&B export, release surface, and GitHub checks from the same commit before publishing readiness claims.
